branding.heroTitle: Launch Your Career in Tech with Industry Experts
branding.heroSubtitle: Master real-world skills through hands-on projects, expert mentorship, and career-focused programs designed to make you job-ready.

branding.aboutDescription: We are a team of software professionals and educators on a mission to simplify coding education. Whether you are preparing for a tech career or upskilling, we deliver hands-on, project-based training with mentorship that matters.
